expectedBehavior: The entitlement test should match the current rookie nav contract in src/config/planPermissions.ts.
actualBehavior: The test still expected only /dashboard and /tasks even though the live rookie config exposes Home, My Files, Saved Mentors, Your Tasks, and Referral Program.
reproSteps: Run node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/plan-permissions.test.ts before the fix.
Observe the rookie nav assertion failure.
recommendedFix: Update the test to assert the canonical rookie nav list and the my-files section binding.

expectedBehavior: Only Rising and Pro should reach the full builder because mvp_builder is preview_only below Rising.
actualBehavior: Any authenticated user received the full MVPBuilder surface; only guests were preview-gated.
reproSteps: Sign in with a Rookie or Starter account.
Open /mvp-builder.
Observe the full builder instead of an upgrade state.
recommendedFix: Gate the route with usePlanAccess('mvp_builder') and render a locked upgrade state when access is missing.

expectedBehavior: Only Rising and Pro should reach the full directories experience because directories is preview_only below Rising.
actualBehavior: Any authenticated user received the full DirectoriesTab; only guests were preview-gated.
reproSteps: Sign in with a Rookie or Starter account.
Open /directories.
Observe the live directories interface instead of an upgrade state.
recommendedFix: Gate the route with usePlanAccess('directories') and render a locked upgrade state when access is missing.

expectedBehavior: Rookie should remain in a locked or upgrade state because pmf_lab is only full on Starter and above.
actualBehavior: Any authenticated user reached the PMF intake and result flow; only credits were enforced by the hook.
reproSteps: Sign in with a Rookie account.
Open /pmf-lab.
Observe the live PMF workflow instead of an upgrade state.
recommendedFix: Gate the route with usePlanAccess('pmf_lab') before rendering the full PMF workflow.

expectedBehavior: Only Rising and Pro should reach the full strategist because gtm_strategist is preview_only below Rising.
actualBehavior: Any authenticated user received the full strategist flow; only guests were preview-gated.
reproSteps: Sign in with a Rookie or Starter account.
Open /go-to-market.
Observe the live strategist instead of an upgrade state.
recommendedFix: Gate the route with usePlanAccess('gtm_strategist') and render a locked upgrade state when access is missing.

expectedBehavior: Rookie should not reach the full template library because email_templates is locked until Starter.
actualBehavior: Any authenticated user received the full EmailTemplatesTab; only guests were preview-gated.
reproSteps: Sign in with a Rookie account.
Open /insighta/email-templates.
Observe the full template library instead of an upgrade state.
recommendedFix: Gate the route with usePlanAccess('email_templates') and render a locked upgrade state when access is missing.

expectedBehavior: Only Rising and Pro should reach the analyzer because pitch_deck_analyzer is locked below Rising.
actualBehavior: Any authenticated user received the upload and analysis flow; only guests were preview-gated.
reproSteps: Sign in with a Rookie or Starter account.
Open /insighta/pitch-deck-analyzer.
Observe the full analyzer instead of an upgrade state.
recommendedFix: Gate the route with usePlanAccess('pitch_deck_analyzer') and render a locked upgrade state when access is missing.

expectedBehavior: The locked-state branch should render a valid upgrade UI for lower-tier signed-in users.
actualBehavior: The page referenced BlurredToolPreview in the locked branch without importing it.
reproSteps: Build or render the locked branch of /tech-stack before the fix.
Observe the missing symbol error path.
recommendedFix: Import BlurredToolPreview and keep the existing usePlanAccess('tech_stack') gate.

expectedBehavior: Critical CTA flows should be executable in an automated browser harness across the standard mobile and desktop viewports.
actualBehavior: The repo has no Playwright, Cypress, or equivalent E2E test layer, so runtime CTA execution remains manual.
reproSteps: Inspect package.json.
Observe that no browser E2E framework is configured.
recommendedFix: Add a minimal browser test harness for auth, upgrade, onboarding, dashboard, and plan-gated entry flows.

expectedBehavior: Every persona in the audit matrix should have a stable runtime fixture or seeded account for reproducible CTA validation.
actualBehavior: The unverified case is modeled through login errors rather than an in-session auth state, and no seeded persona fixtures are present in the repo.
reproSteps: Inspect the AuthContext, Login page, and authErrors mapping.
Observe that unverified is handled as a login error state and that no test account fixtures exist in-repo.
recommendedFix: Provision stable persona fixtures and document them alongside the audit matrix.
